final:
// // This comment suggests that the counter is cleared to 1111 on reset, which is opposite to the actual behavior.
module johnson_counter
(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] q
);

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 4'b0000; // Clear counter to 0000
        end else begin
            q <= {~q[0], q[3:1]}; // Rotate and invert the MSB
        end
    end

endmodule
